title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.180 - Sections 443.160 and 443.170 construed
text:
443.180.  Sections 443.160 and 443.170 construed. — Nothing contained in sections 443.160 and 443.170 shall be so construed as to make any executor or administrator liable to his decedent's estate for any indebtedness by mortgage or deed of trust, released by him in accordance with this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 3478) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3091; 1919 § 2250; 1909 § 2855
